residual_region_ranking.exact_score_source: experiments/contest_auth_eval.py --device cuda on exact archive bytes

visual_primitives.exact_score_source: none in this packet; exact score requires archive.zip -> inflate.sh -> upstream/evaluate.py on CUDA

temporal_primitives.track_proxy_limitations: diagnostic component-edge counts only; exact score truth remains CUDA auth eval

blocked_commands.blocked_by: requires passing Alpha-Geo packet, pose-regeneration provenance, archive custody, and external L2/Grand Council gates
blocked_commands.name: exact_cuda_auth_eval

repair_specs.activation_rule: only after decoded-baseline retrain reduces global and boundary blockers but critical component blockers remain
repair_specs.byte_accounting: all residual side information must live inside archive.zip

training_specs.objective: preserve decoded-baseline lane/vehicle components before rate optimization
sample_weighting: weight class 1 and class 2 component interiors above all-background/global CE
weight pose-sensitive components whose box y1 >= 0.60 * height

training_specs.objective: match decoded-baseline boundary geometry within the 2px Alpha-Geo band
sample_weighting: weight baseline 1px and 2px boundary bands for all classes
apply extra weight to lane and road boundary families because lane baseline coverage is lowest
keep class targets integer; no scorer or PoseNet proxy is part of this diagnostic spec
train adjacent frame pairs, not only independent coordinates
oversample worst_frame_pairs in descending transition_disagreement_rate order
penalize false-negative baseline transitions separately from false-positive candidate transitions

training_specs.objective: reduce all-pixel Hamming disagreement against decoded baseline before any archive score spend
sample_weighting: keep uniform decoded-baseline CE as the base objective
do not train against fresh SegNet argmax labels for Alpha-Geo repair
do not lower component or boundary weights to chase byte count until geometry gates pass
